excerpt:

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Found a hidden gem: Trace actions directly to the source!

We’ve all been there—trying to troubleshoot a complex board and scrolling through dozens of automations to find the “culprit” behind a status change or item creation.

I just noticed a brilliant new addition in the Activity Log. Now, when you click on the automation/workflow icon for a specific action, it acts as a direct link! It takes you straight to the builder for the exact automation/workflow that caused it.

This is a massive win for those of us managing high-volume boards. It’s turned a “needle in a haystack” search into a one-click fix.

Quick Tip: If you have multiple workflows firing at once, this is the fastest way to debug your logic without losing your mind.

Anyone else finding this as life-saving as I am?

PS: I submitted this as a feature request not too long ago! I’m glad to see it come to fruition!

Screenshot 2026-03-10 at 16.52.312066×760 54.1 KB
